raw_analysis:
## Sentiment Landscape

Highly volatile and risk-averse. Geopolitical tensions dominating discourse with significant fear around Iran conflict escalation. Financial markets showing extreme stress ($900B wipeout) while political transitions create additional uncertainty. Technology sector showing mixed signals - excitement around SpaceX IPO offset by broader market selloff. Cultural sentiment increasingly polarized with high engagement on divisive content.

## Convergence Signals

Multiple independent sources confirm escalating US-Iran tensions with immediate market impact (oil surge, equity selloff, treasury yield spike). Fed leadership transition timing coincides with geopolitical stress, creating compounding uncertainty. AI agent development accelerating across multiple platforms simultaneously, suggesting infrastructure maturation inflection point approaching.

## Risk Alerts

IMMEDIATE: Geopolitical risk premium spiking with potential for oil price shock affecting operational costs. Market volatility creating liquidity concerns across asset classes. MEDIUM-TERM: Fed policy uncertainty under new leadership could dramatically alter interest rate environment affecting financing costs. Cultural polarization creating brand positioning risks in content creation space.
